title: GENERAL MEDICAL CARE - 211info
text: ORCHID HEALTH MCKENZIE RIVER GENERAL MEDICAL CARE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Community clinic providing family medicine such as general medical care, women's health, and pediatrics. Services also include immunizations, prescriptions, laboratory, dermatology, chronic disease management, minor surgery, and treatment for emergencies. 51730 Dexter Street Blue River, OR 97413 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Wednesday 8:30am-7pm, Thursday-Friday 8:30am-5pm Email (541) 822-3341 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 822-3341 FAX (833) 905-2303 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call to schedule an appointment FEES: Varies by service. Accepts OHP, Medicare, private insurance, and offers a sliding scale fee DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable AREA SERVED: Lane County Services: Childhood Immunization Community Clinics General Medical Care Obstetrics/Gynecology Pediatrics Vaccine Information If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
